title: P3: Delete IntentAssessment.cs, dead HtnPlanner branches, CreateCreativeBuildActions
description: Delete IntentAssessment.cs (zero consumers, superseded by IGoalPrecondition/IGoalPostcondition in PlanningPolicy.cs). Delete dead HtnPlanner branches: BuildGoal/CraftItemGoal/IItemSpecGoal switch cases (lines 56-84, unreachable via PlannerRouter), and CreateCreativeBuildActions private static method (lines 126-153, zero call sites).
